# transplant.today

> transplant.today is a free, open-source transplant research platform for patients, families, and policy researchers. It compares 248 U.S. transplant centers using public data from 8 sources (SRTR, OPTN, CDC, CMS, EPA, BLS, NHTSA, HRSA), supporting policy analysis, what-if scenarios, and equity modeling. The landing page features a scrollytelling experience that introduces the transplant system through data-driven storytelling.

## Tools

- [Find My Centers](/find-centers.html): Personalized center recommendations based on location, organ type, and blood type
- [Wait Time Estimator](/wait-estimator.html): Quick median wait time estimate by organ and blood type
- [Center Explorer](/centers.html): Search and filter all 248 transplant centers by name, location, or organ
- [Compare Centers](/compare.html): Side-by-side comparison of up to 3 centers
- [Simulator](/simulator.html): Full Monte Carlo simulation with 1,000 iterations modeling transplant probability over time
- [Data Explorer](/data.html): Interactive exploration of national transplant trends, regional disparities, and center-level metrics for policy analysis and equity research

## Patient Resources

- [Organ Guides](/organ-guides.html): Organ-specific transplant guides for kidney, liver, heart, lung, and pancreas
- [Education](/education.html): The transplant process, allocation rules, glossary, SRTR data guide, medications
- [Patient Support](/support.html): Financial assistance, travel/lodging, peer support, caregiver resources, insurance
- [FAQ](/faq.html): 10 common questions about transplant waitlists, allocation, and center data
- [Checklist](/checklist.html): Interactive 34-item transplant journey tracker with 5 phases
- [Advocacy & Give Back](/advocacy.html): Become an organ donor, join bone marrow registry, donate blood, volunteer

## Center Detail Pages

Each of the 248 centers has a detail page at `/center.html?code={CODE}` showing:
- Organ programs with graft/patient survival rates, hazard ratios, and volume
- Waitlist activity (waiting, added, transplanted, died, removed)
- Contact info (address, phone, website) with live SRTR API fetch
- Interactive map
- Nearby centers within 250 miles

## Data Sources

- SRTR (Scientific Registry of Transplant Recipients) - center outcomes, waitlist data, performance ratings
- OPTN (Organ Procurement and Transplantation Network) - allocation policies, center listings
- CDC - health demographics, cause of death by region
- CMS - hospital quality ratings
- EPA - air quality data
- BLS - cost of living indices
- NHTSA - traffic fatality rates for donor availability modeling
- HRSA - health resources and services data

## Technical

- Frontend: Vanilla JavaScript, Leaflet maps, Chart.js
- Backend: Python FastAPI with NumPy/SciPy for Monte Carlo simulation
- Data: 248 geocoded transplant centers, refreshed weekly via automated pipelines
- Open source: https://github.com/rivirside/TransPlan
